evidence.s1_t2_reverse_operator_confirmation: Operator confirmed MOVE D=-10 V=1 physically moved backward; STM32 odometry reported STAT.D=+8.1cm, so odometry D sign is opposite the command D sign for reverse.

notes: Master rebuild update 2026-06-21: yaw_cw_positive was revalidated by S1.T1 manual clockwise-from-top 90deg rotation; measured yaw delta was +88.7deg, error vs 90deg was 1.3deg. Operator confirmed ZERO_YAW/zero-drift/hold passed. odom_d_reverse_negative was revalidated by S1.T2 reverse/forward comparison: operator confirmed MOVE D=-10 V=1 physically moved backward while final STAT.D=+8.1cm, and MOVE D=+10 V=1 produced final STAT.D=+8.2cm. Therefore STAT.D is a distance magnitude, not a signed direction source; use command sign, DIR, and signed Y for forward/backward direction. Reverse odometry D is positive, so odom_d_reverse_negative=false. odom_x_right_positive was revalidated from 2026-06-21 ARC artifacts by s1_t2_odom_sign_audit: reverse right arcs (STE>100) report positive X and reverse left arcs (STE<100) report negative X. vision_lateral_left_negative remains a historical 2026-06-13 value until its rebuild-stage test is rerun.
